title: AI_OS Packet Lock Ownership
description: Foundation schema stub for packet and worker path ownership locks.

schema.description: Identifies this object as an AI_OS packet lock.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this lock schema contract.

worker_id.description: Worker that owns or requested the lock.

status.description: Lock status, such as ACTIVE, RELEASED, EXPIRED, BLOCKED, or REVIEW_REQUIRED.

claimed_paths.description: Files or folders claimed by this lock.
